context: Tests whether the answer preserves the MapKit skill's boundaries while routing CarPlay, App Clips, and BLE/accessory work to sibling domains.

checklist.name: Map Scope
checklist.description: Keeps maps, camera state, annotations, overlays, selection, place cards, search, geocoding, routes, and ETA in MapKit scope.

checklist.name: Location Scope
checklist.description: Keeps user location, live updates, CLServiceSession, and CLMonitor geofencing in MapKit/CoreLocation scope; discusses background constraints when background monitoring, terminated relaunch, or continuous background updates are proposed.

checklist.name: CarPlay Routing
checklist.description: Routes CarPlay scene setup, templates, navigation alerts, entitlements, and in-car UI rules to CarPlay guidance.

checklist.name: CarPlay Handoff
checklist.description: Limits MapKit's CarPlay role to providing route, destination, ETA, coordinate, or place data.

checklist.name: App Clip Routing
checklist.description: Routes App Clip invocation infrastructure such as associated domains, invocation URLs, card metadata, and continuation to App Clips guidance.

checklist.name: App Clip Handoff
checklist.description: Limits MapKit's App Clip role to selected place context, map item, URL, or place-card action data.

checklist.name: BLE Routing
checklist.description: Routes BLE scanning, pairing, permissions, accessory onboarding, and beacon protocol handling to Core Bluetooth or AccessorySetupKit guidance.

checklist.name: Geofence Handoff
checklist.description: Explains that a geofence event can trigger adjacent workflows without making MapKit own BLE or accessory setup.

checklist.name: No Overclaim
checklist.description: Does not claim MapKit directly handles CarPlay templates, App Clip launch infrastructure, or BLE pairing.

checklist.name: Boundary Clarity
checklist.description: Provides a clear end-to-end handoff sequence between MapKit/CoreLocation and the adjacent frameworks.
